entries.title: Build a RAG agent with LangChain
snippets: LangChain RAG applications combine retrieval with model calls so answers can use external context.
Start with a simple retrieval pipeline before adding more advanced agentic behavior.

entries.title: Retrieval
snippets: Retrieval systems fetch relevant documents and pass them to a model as context.
Use retrievers when an application needs knowledge from documents or other external sources.

entries.title: st.chat_message
snippets: st.chat_message inserts a chat message container for a user or assistant turn.
Use chat message containers to build conversational layouts in Streamlit apps.

entries.title: st.session_state
snippets: st.session_state stores values across reruns for a single Streamlit session.
Use session state to preserve chat history and other per-session variables.

entries.title: Persistent Client
snippets: Use a persistent Chroma client when collections should survive process restarts.
A persistent client stores collections on disk instead of keeping them only in memory.

entries.title: Metadata Filtering
snippets: Metadata filtering narrows retrieval to documents whose metadata matches the filter.
Use metadata filters when you need targeted retrieval by tags or attributes.
